the desk staff at Vancouver and Victoria again for going the extra mile in getting the mobile phone we left in Vancouver back to us. We really appreciate your efforts and you certainly made our last day in Canada as amazing as the rest of our holiday there. We will most certainly be making use of your services again in future.” tab_id=”1775785037116-9″][testimonial star_rating=”none” title=”Testimonial” id=”1775785037134-8″ name=”Samhainn22 @ Tripadvisor” quote=”Breathtaking views on flight to Vancouver Island – Safe flight. Great pilots. Large comfortable helicopter. The views were spectacular! What an incredible way to see the beautiful waterways and islands.” tab_id=”1775785037135-0″][testimonial star_rating=”none” title=”Testimonial” id=”1775785037150-6″ name=”Deb @ Cakes Etc – via email” quote=”“Thank you so much for an amazing trip to Vancouver. We enjoyed a great family day, shopping and seeing Stanley Park. On Saturday morning, when we arrived at the Helijet terminal we were greeted by a lovely, friendly lady, who was such a great host, a credit to Helijet. Having such a friendly & helpful staff member makes such a difference to a customer’s experience with any company.“” tab_id=”1775785037150-8″][/testimonial_slider][/vc_column][/vc_row]
